definition:
A man living at the time of United Monarchy, first mentioned at 2Sa.21.19; 
 father of: Elhanan (H0445)
Also named: ya.ur (יָעִיר "Jair" H3265) 
 § Jaare-oregim = "forests of weaver"
 a man of Bethlehem, father of Elhanan the giant slayer and one of David's mighty warriors; also called 'Jair'
